MeeTask Recorder: Capture, Transcribe, and Manage Your Meetings Effortlessly

Transform your meetings into actionable tasks with the MeeTask Recorder Chrome extension. This powerful tool allows you to seamlessly record both meeting audio and your microphone input with superior quality. Whether you need to capture every word in a conference or just your own thoughts, MeeTask Recorder ensures you won't miss a thing.

Key Features:
 - High-Quality Audio Recording: Record meeting audio and microphone input with exceptional clarity.
 - Mute/Unmute Controls: Independently mute or unmute the meeting audio or your microphone to manage what gets recorded.
 - Pause and Resume Recording: Easily pause the recording when needed and resume at your convenience.
 - Effortless Integration: Open the recorder tab in MeeTask to start capturing your meetings.
 - Save and Manage Recordings: Save your recorded meetings directly in the MeeTask app for easy access and management.
 - Automatic Transcription: Convert your meeting audio into text automatically, making it simple to review and share meeting minutes.
 - Actionable Insights: Utilize AI-based solutions to digitalize meeting minutes and integrate task management, helping you turn discussions into actionable tasks.
 
MeeTask is designed to streamline your meeting experience, ensuring that no valuable information is lost and that you can focus on what truly matters – transforming words into tasks.

Cognitive AI Coach: Your Real-Time AI Meeting and Video Assistant

Transform your meetings, tutorials, and video streams into…

Cognitive AI Coach: Your Real-Time AI Meeting and Video Assistant

Transform your meetings, tutorials, and video streams into interactive experiences. Cognitive AI Coach is a powerful Chrome extension that works as your co-pilot, providing live subtitles and AI-powered insights.

KEY FEATURES:

🎙️ Real-Time Transcription: Get highly accurate, live subtitles for any audio playing in your browser. Perfect for Google Meet, Teams, or video platforms. It features advanced multilingual support, including Hinglish.

🤖 Smart AI Q&A: The extension's "Cognitive" brain actively listens. When a question is detected in the conversation, the AI automatically generates a context-aware answer for your review.

💬 Interactive AI Chat: You're in control. Manually ask the AI assistant questions by typing or using the built-in microphone. The AI uses the conversation history to provide relevant, in-depth answers.

✅ Simple & Seamless: The UI is designed to be non-intrusive and lag-free, overlaying your content without getting in the way.

Whether you're in a fast-paced meeting, learning from a complex tutorial, or just want to ensure you never miss a detail, Cognitive AI Coach is the tool you need to stay ahead.

Capture website animations as intelligent keyframe sequences with timing metadata, optimized for AI model consumption.

SnapFrame captures website animations and converts them into structured keyframe sequences that AI models can understand and reproduce.

**How It Works**

1. Click the SnapFrame icon on any webpage
2. Choose a trigger mode: auto-scroll (captures the page top to bottom) or manual (you control the interaction)
3. Press Start Recording -- SnapFrame captures frames at your chosen FPS
4. When you stop, SnapFrame's differencing engine analyzes every frame and extracts only the keyframes where meaningful visual change occurred
5. Download a ZIP package containing sequenced PNG frames, a metadata.json with timing and easing data, and a ready-to-use AI prompt

**What You Get**

Each export contains:
- Sequenced PNG keyframes (frame_001.png, frame_002.png, ...)
- metadata.json with timestamps, change deltas, estimated easing curve, and capture settings
- prompt.txt -- a pre-written prompt you can paste directly into ChatGPT, Claude, or any AI assistant along with the keyframe images

**Key Features**

- Smart keyframe extraction: only keeps frames where real visual change happened, not hundreds of duplicate frames
- Easing detection: automatically estimates whether the animation uses linear, ease-in, ease-out, or ease-in-out timing
- Configurable FPS (4-30) and scroll speed (1-10)
- Two trigger modes: auto-scroll for scroll-based animations, manual for hover/click interactions
- Recording history with re-download support
- Region selection for capturing specific parts of a page
- Lightweight: zero impact on pages until you start recording
- Dark UI that stays out of your way

**Who Is This For?**

- Developers who want to recreate animations they see on the web
- Designers capturing animation references for handoff
- AI/ML practitioners building training datasets of web animations
- Anyone who wants to reverse-engineer how a website animation works

**Privacy**

SnapFrame processes everything locally in your browser. No data is sent to any server. Captured frames never leave your machine unless you explicitly export and share them.

Annotate any web page with shapes and a focus spotlight. Record the tab as a demo video with optional mic and tab audio.

Easy Demo turns any web page into a clean, annotated demo in seconds.
Press ⌥A (Mac) or Alt+A (Windows / Linux) on any site, draw an arrow, highlight a button, drop a spotlight on the part that matters — then save a snapshot. No recording, no signup, no upload. Just fast, focused visuals you can drop straight into a Slack message, ticket, slide, or email.
Built for people who explain things on the web all day: sales engineers, customer success reps, support agents, product marketers, QA testers, designers, and trainers.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
WHAT YOU CAN DO
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
✏️ Annotate live pages — draw arrows, rectangles, circles, and freehand lines directly on top of any website
🔦 Spotlight focus — dim everything except the area you want your audience looking at
📸 One-click snapshots — capture the annotated view as an image, ready to share
⌨️ Keyboard-first — toggle the annotator with ⌥A on Mac or Alt+A on Windows/Linux, no mouse hunting
🪶 Lightweight — under 25 KB, no background tracking, no slowdowns
🔒 100% local — your annotations and snapshots never leave your browser
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
PERFECT FOR
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Sales engineers prepping a demo or sending a follow-up screenshot
Customer success teams walking customers through a feature in an email or ticket
Support agents showing exactly where to click instead of writing a paragraph
Product marketers capturing crisp feature shots for launch posts and decks
QA & bug reporters circling the broken pixel and shipping it to the dev team
Designers giving feedback on a live staging site without leaving the browser
Trainers and educators building step-by-step web walkthroughs
Anyone who's ever pasted "see attached" with a sloppy screenshot

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
WHY EASY DEMO
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
Most demo and screenshot tools are heavy. They want you to record video, sign up, upload to their cloud, and pay monthly. Easy Demo does the 80% you actually need — annotate, spotlight, snapshot — instantly, in one keyboard shortcut, with nothing to set up.
No account. No watermark. No data collection.
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
HOW IT WORKS
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Install Easy Demo
Open any web page
Press ⌥A on Mac (or Alt+A on Windows/Linux) — or click the toolbar icon — to activate the annotator
Draw arrows, boxes, circles, or drop a spotlight
Click "Save snapshot" to grab the image
Press the same shortcut again to clear and continue browsing

That's it.
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
PRIVACY-FIRST
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
Easy Demo runs entirely in your browser. We don't see your screenshots, your annotations, or the pages you visit. No analytics, no telemetry, no third-party calls.

activeTab — so we can draw on the page you're currently viewing
scripting — to inject the annotation overlay
storage — to remember your tool preferences locally

Record audio from the active tab, trim loops, adjust tempo, apply effects, and export WAV samples.

SampLift is a browser audio sampling tool for Chrome.

SampLift lets you record audio from the active tab after you click the extension, then trim, loop, adjust tempo, apply effects, and export your sample as a WAV file.

SampLift only starts recording when you intentionally open the extension and press Record. Audio is processed locally in your browser and is not uploaded to SampLift-owned servers.

Free features:
• Record audio from the active browser tab
• View the recorded waveform
• Trim the start and end of your sample
• Loop playback
• Adjust tempo
• Use volume and filter controls
• Export a WAV file

Optional SampLift Pro upgrade:
SampLift includes an optional one-time lifetime Pro upgrade. Pro unlocks pitch shifting, resonance, delay, reverb, drive, pan, one-shot playback, auto bar trimming, longer recordings, and full export features.

SampLift is intended for musicians, producers, DJs, remixers, creators, and audio hobbyists who want a fast way to sample and shape audio playing in a tab they choose.

Privacy and payments:
SampLift processes recorded audio locally in the browser. SampLift does not upload your recordings to SampLift-owned servers. Payments and Pro purchase verification are handled by ExtensionPay and Stripe.

Important:
Only record audio that you have the right to record and use. SampLift does not bypass DRM, access paid content, remove copy protection, or download media files from websites.

Visual effects: brightness, sharpness, 3D anaglyph... Audio effects: equalizer, sound normalization. Notes with timecodes and links

Works both online and with local files.

Features:

Visual Effects

Visual effects can be assigned to any page element using a CSS selector, both to the entire page and to a video element.

Filters:
1. Brightness amplitude, including RGB components.
2. Brightness exponent, including RGB components.
3. Contrast, including RGB components.
4. Saturation, including RGB components.
5. 3D anaglyph with presets: red-cyan, cyan-red, green-magenta, magenta-green, red-blue, blue-red.
6. Color shifting using various methods, including shifting all colors together and individually.
7. Sharpening, including scale parameters, the number of pixels in the matrix, the visibility of the sharpening layer, the brightness amplitude, and the brightness exponent of this layer. Sharpening can also be blurred by using negative scale values.
8. An additional sharpening option, as in the previous section, can be applied again by adjusting its parameters.
9. Color inversion, including RGB components.
10. Blur.
11. Grayscale.
12. Sepia.
13. Opacity.

Visual transformation
1. Scaling along axes, both simultaneously along all axes and individually.
2. Rotation.
3. Shear along each axis.
4. Tilt along each axis.

Audio Effects

1. Equalizer. An equalizer is useful if you want to enhance audio data or compensate for the characteristics of your audio output equipment. It's also used for music.
Filters:
1) HP (high-pass filter).
2) HS (high-shelf filter).
3) LP (low-pass filter).
4) LS (low-shelf filter).
5) Peaking filter.
6) Notch filter.
7) BP (constant skirt).
8) BP (zero peak).
Audio normalization is useful when the video involves a loud or quiet speaker. Audio normalization eliminates the need to increase or decrease the volume for different videos, as this extension automatically adjusts the audio volume. In some cases, you may hear new sounds that weren't audible before normalization.

Notes or comments

Text messages (stored locally only for you).

Interactive elements in text
1. Links
2. Timecodes for video or audio
3. Clips. You can specify a time range for a video or audio clip and configure volume, repeat, playback speed, and pitch settings for it. You can also select an index for it on the page, which is useful if there are multiple videos or audio clips on a page.
4. Playlists. You can create a playlist for clips. Playlists play clips based on the links above them. You can add your own clips under each link.
5. All these features can be copied as text, and then converted into fully functional notes by pasting the text into a note.

Radars
Radars are a feature that allows you to link context (effects and notes) to a page. Radars allow you to specify rules using a variety of page information.
Available information for linking to a page:
1. Page title.
2. Page address.
3. JSON-JD elements.
4. Microdata elements.
5. Elements from the HTML meta tag.

Data
Data is stored locally. It can be imported and exported.
